questionHtml: Classify PVC and polyethene terephthalate, PET, as addition or condensation polymers and deduce the structural formulas.
markschemeHtml:
PVC: addition AND PET: condensation ✔

structure of PVC monomer ✔

structure of PET monomers ✔


Accept full OR condensed structural formulas.

meta.title: Classify PVC and polyethene terephthalate, PET, as addition or condensation polymers and deduce the structural formulas.
breadcrumbLabels: Structure 2. Models of bonding and structure
Structure 2.4.5—Addition polymers form by the breaking of a double bond in each monomer. Represent the repeating unit of an addition polymer from given monomer structures.
Structure 2. Models of bonding and structure

Structure 2.4.6—Condensation polymers form by the reaction between functional groups in each monomer with the release of a small molecule. Represent the repeating unit of polyamides and polyesters from given monomer structures.
